name: security-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins for security/compliance work — currently the Sec Policy Analyzer (Node) for parsing policy .docx into structured v2 JSON.

plugins.name: sec-policy-analyzer-node
plugins.description: Parse security/compliance policy .docx (NIST, ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI DSS, …) into structured JSON with full-ancestor IDs, framework-coded policy-id, scopes/assets/linkage fields, an assignment-selectors index, and optional flat CSV. v0.4 adds a direct .docx → v3 parser (compact uppercase id family SECT/COND/STMT/SUST/ROLE/RESP/SCOP/SLCT, condition framework-tags, legacy-reference-id back-links), a scaffolded parsing-output workspace (policy / controls / procedures / evidence-tasks / templates with bundled templates) wired into /sec-policy-setup, and default routing of parser and controls-mapper outputs into that workspace. Also ships the v2 parser and the policy-to-controls mapping skill that crosswalks parsed statements to a controls catalog (NIST xlsx) and emits top-pick mappings with related procedure IDs. Node + adm-zip + fast-xml-parser; no Python required.
